linting.notes: RUSTFLAGS="-Dwarnings" is set in CI to treat warnings as errors. Pre-commit hooks run fmt (nightly), cargo check, and clippy. rustfmt config uses grouped imports (StdExternalCrate) with crate-level granularity.

testing.framework: Rust native test framework with tokio::test for async
setup_required: Install nightly rustfmt: rustup component add --toolchain nightly-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu rustfmt
env_vars: RUSTFLAGS="-Dwarnings" (in CI, treats warnings as errors)
testing.mock_patterns: Uses mocktail crate for HTTP server mocking. Tests create TestOrchestratorServer instances with mock detector servers.
testing.notes: Tests are integration tests using #[test(tokio::test)] attribute for async. Common test utilities in tests/common/. Test config in tests/test_config.yaml. 120 total tests across unit tests and 12 integration test files.

ci.notes: CI runs on ubuntu-latest for push/pull_request on main, incubation, stable branches. Installs protoc 26.0 and nightly rustfmt before checks. Uses Rust dependency caching. RUSTFLAGS="-Dwarnings" ensures compilation warnings fail CI.

build.install_command: cargo fetch (dependencies auto-installed on first build)
build.notes: Requires protoc (protocol buffer compiler) to be installed system-wide. Uses tonic-build for gRPC code generation from protos/ directory. Release build: cargo build --release. Run server: cargo run --bin fms-guardrails-orchestr8

conventions.test_file_pattern: tests/*.rs (integration tests), src/**/*_test.rs or #[test] in source files (unit tests)
conventions.test_naming: Integration test files named descriptively (e.g., chat_detection.rs). Test functions use #[test] or #[test(tokio::test)] attributes. Functions named descriptively (e.g., no_detections, input_detectors).
conventions.import_style: Grouped imports with StdExternalCrate style, crate-level granularity per rustfmt.toml
conventions.notes: Rust edition 2024. Authors listed in Cargo.toml. Uses Apache 2.0 license. Code follows standard Rust conventions with clippy as linter.

setup_commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl unzip protobuf-compiler

test_commands.notes: All 120 tests passed across 12 integration test files + unit tests

container_recipe.notes: Build takes ~30 seconds with caching. Tests complete in ~10 seconds. Nightly toolchain needed only for rustfmt. Protoc from Debian repos (3.21.12) works fine despite CI using 26.0.
